title: KPath
content:
# KPath


## Methods


### raise_if_has_files() -> Any

Raise an exception if the path contains files.


### delete_dir() -> Any

A simple wrapper around the deletion of a directory.


### create_dir(parents: bool, exist_ok: bool) -> Any

Create a directory.


### read_yaml_all(verbose: bool) -> Iterator

Load the content of the specified yaml_file into a dictionary.


### read_yaml(context: Optional[Mapping[str, Any]], delimiter_style: DelimiterStyle, verbose: bool) -> Dict[str, Any]

Load the content of the specified yaml_file into a dictionary.


### write_yaml(yaml_data: dict) -> Any

Write the provided yaml data to a file.


### complete_path() -> KPath


### read_content() -> Any

Read content from the provided file.


### write_content(content: str) -> Any

Write the provided data to the file.


### read_json() -> dict

Read json content from the provided file.


### write_json(content: Any) -> Any

Parameters ---------- content : Any the json data to write into the file


### dir_content() -> List[str]

Retrieve the list of files contained inside the folder.


### clone_into(path: KPath) -> Any

Clones the current file into the newly provided path.


### clone_dir_into(path: KPath) -> Any

Clones the current directory into the newly provided dir path.


### remove() -> Any

A simple remove wrapper for KPath
